name: Ruin
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Burst] Potency or Count. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

[Burst] effects deal +150% damage against enemy Shield

Turn Start: enemies or Parts with [Burst] lose (3 + ([Burst] Potency / 2)) Offense Level and Defense Level. (max 6)

When inflicting [Burst] Potency or Count with Skill effects, inflict 2 [Burst] Potency and +1 [Burst] Count against the target. If the target has less than 15 [Burst] Potency, inflict 2 additional [Burst] Potency.

Coin Power +1 for Plus Coin Skills that inflict [Burst] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Rupture'
Base Power +(4 / # of Coins) (min. 1; rounded down) for Minus Coin Skills that inflict [Burst] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Rupture'
